deliverableModel.selectionMethod: Grid search on training split, validation reported out-of-sample by symbol split

integrationContract.input: OHLCV table with columns: open, high, low, close, volume
integrationContract.output: Transformed OHLCV table with PT model prices: pt_open, pt_high, pt_low, pt_close, pt_volume
integrationContract.institutionUsage: Run existing trading strategies against the transformed OHLCV columns without changing strategy rules
